welcome.title: Welcome to Football Identity!
welcome.body: Your athlete was created. Explore the dashboard and start your career.

training_available.title: Training Available
training_available.body: Click on the attributes in the Attributes screen to train and improve.

agreement_proposed.title: 🤝 Mutual Agreement Proposal
agreement_proposed.body: Your club proposed a mutual agreement termination.

fired.title: Released
fired.body: {{club}} terminated your contract. You're a free agent.

mutual_exit_accepted.title: Exit accepted!
mutual_exit_accepted.body: {{club}} accepted your mutual exit. You're a free agent.

player_sold.title: 💰 Player Sold
player_sold.body: {{player}} sold for {{amount}}. Amount credited to the club's finances.
